constructors.name: FileObjWriteOptions
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileObjWriteOptions class

methods.name: GetTransform
methods.summary: Calculates the transform combination of ZToY and any the translation that might occur in a SavewithOrigin.

properties.name: ActualFilePathOnMac
properties.remarks: The path passed to FileExportPlugIn::WriteFile on the Mac is a temporary path. The calling function takes care of moving the temp (.obj) file to it's appropriate location. We can't use that to write that path to construct the .mat file because the calling function doesn't know anything about it. ActualFilePathOnMac is the path of the obj file's ultimate destination. It's only meaningful on the Mac platform.

properties.name: CreateNgons
properties.summary: Setting to enable/disable the creation of ngons for the output

properties.name: CullUnnecessaryVertexesInNgons
properties.summary: Setting to determine whether interior collinear vertexes are part of the ngon.
properties.remarks: Imagine a plane that has been split and then rejoined. If IncludeUnweldedEdgesInNgons is set to true then you would get an ngon with 6 vertexes, the corners and one on each edge that was split. Setting this to true would remove those 2 vertexes from the interior of the edge. TODO This is not hooked up yet, Dale hasn't made this available yet. See RH-30673.

properties.name: EolType
properties.remarks: Alias/Wavefront OBJ files are ASCII files. Generally they should have a LF (UNIX) as the end-of-line marker.

properties.name: ExportAsTriangles
properties.summary: Enable/disable export of faces as triangles.

properties.name: ExportGroupNameLayerNames
properties.summary: Setting to determine whether object, group or layer names will become "g"s in the OBJ output file

properties.name: ExportMaterialDefinitions
properties.summary: Setting to write an .mtl file and "usemtl"s in the obj file

properties.name: ExportNormals
properties.summary: Enable/disable export of vertex normals, if they exist.

properties.name: ExportObjectNames
properties.summary: Setting to determine what object names in Rhino will become in the OBJ output file

properties.name: ExportOpenMeshes
properties.summary: Enable/Disable bailing when an open mesh is encountered.

properties.name: ExportTcs
properties.summary: Enable/disable export of texture coordinates, if they exist.

properties.name: ExportVcs
properties.summary: Enable/disable export of vertex colors, if they exist.

properties.name: IncludeUnweldedEdgesInNgons
properties.summary: Setting to determine whether unwelded edges are ignored in the creation of an ngon.
properties.remarks: Imagine a plane that has been split and then rejoined. This setting determines if you will get one or two ngons in the output. TODO This is not hooked up yet, Dale hasn't made this available yet. See RH-30673.

properties.name: MapZtoY
properties.summary: Setting to transform Rhino's Z axis to OBJ's Y axis

properties.name: MergeNestedGroupingNames
properties.summary: Setting to merge nested layer or group names into a single OBJ group name
properties.remarks: Setting this to true will take a layer setup like this in Rhino Grandparent Parent Child and make a group name of Grandparent__Parent__Child in obj. If false it will be 3 separate group names in obj and will look like this in the file. g Grandparent Parent Child

properties.name: MeshParameters
properties.summary: Mesh parameters to use when meshing geometry that is not already a mesh.

properties.name: MinNgonFaceCount
properties.summary: Minimum number of faces to consider creation of ngon

properties.name: SignificantDigits
properties.summary: Number of significant digits to write out for floating point numbers

properties.name: SortObjGroups
properties.summary: Setting to enable/disable sorting of OBJ groups
properties.remarks: This is mainly for the sake of making an obj file more human readable, however, it is important that it happens when a user has opted to write Rhino groups as OBJ "g"s since it is not necessary for every object in Rhino to be part of a group.

properties.name: SubDSurfaceMeshingDensity
properties.summary: Determines how coarse the mesh output will be when surface meshing subd objects See comments for ON_SubDDisplayParameters in opennurbs_mesh.h for details regarding numbers used.

properties.name: TrimCurveType
properties.summary: trimming curve option

properties.name: UnderbarMaterialNames
properties.summary: Enable/disable replacing white space with under-bars in material names.

properties.name: UseDisplayColorForMaterial
properties.summary: Setting to display color as material when material index for object is -1.

properties.name: UseRelativeIndexing
properties.summary: Determines whether to use relative indexing. TRUE = use relative (negative) indexing FALSE = use absolute (positive) indexing
properties.remarks: This only has an impact on non-mesh output. There is also no interface in the OBJ export plug-in so code executed when set to true has not been thoroughly tested. It has been there forever and migrated with each successive revision of OBJ export code.

properties.name: UseRenderMeshes
properties.summary: Use existing or generate render meshes instead of calling RhinoObject.MeshObjects.

properties.name: UseSimpleDialog
properties.summary: Determines whether to use the simple or detailed meshing dialog.

properties.name: WrapLongLines
properties.summary: Setting to enable/disable line wrapping with "\"s

properties.name: AngleTolRadians
properties.summary: If trim is TL_OBJ_FILE_TRIM_POLYLINE, angle_tol (in radians) controls the level of linearization on parameter space trimming curves.
